description: CompositionGrey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck and chest printFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm ironHit the roads in style with this spykar T-shirt.
